topWPAPlays.description: Jahmai Jones grounds into a double play, third baseman Colson Montgomery to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Miguel Vargas. Spencer Torkelson out at 2nd. Jahmai Jones out at 1st.

Spencer Torkelson strikes out on a foul tip.
Dylan Crews hit by pitch. CJ Abrams scores. José Tena to 3rd. Jorbit Vivas to 2nd.

Padres challenged (force play), call on the field was upheld: Drew Millas reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. José Tena scores. Jorbit Vivas to 3rd. Dylan Crews to 2nd. Missed catch error by shortstop Xander Bogaerts, assist to second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr.
